title: Dried Dog Treats Chicken Rawhide Chews 500g - Soft Rawhide Dog Chew - Chewy Chicken Twists Perfect as Puppy Treats - High Protein and Low Fat Sticks
features: Tested Quality: Each raw hide chew for dogs undergoes ingredient, cooking, and final product testing. This ensures that our dog chews are made from top-quality hides, are 100% safe for animals, and meet the highest standards. The result? A naturally good-smelling, protein-rich dog treats made with 100% chicken meat - low in fat, no added sugar or salt, non-toxic, and full of flavour

Smile Worthy Chews: Our natural dog treats promote dental hygiene and support healthy teeth and gums. Chewing helps clean teeth and maintain oral health, keeping your companion healthy and happy. These chicken chews for dogs are made without cheap fillers – just quality ingredients for a treat that’s both tasty and beneficial

Chews To Go: These dried chicken treats for dogs are perfectly sized for daily outings - great for walks, travel, or quick rewards. Soft and chewy, they suit small, medium, and large breeds, including older dogs and puppies over 6 months. Convenient to carry and easy to serve, these puppy chews from DriedDogTreats make treating simple wherever you are

Tasty Motivation for Training: Our chicken dog sticks are designed to be flexible and not too dry, making them safe and enjoyable to chew. Ideal as dog training treats, they work perfectly as a reward - even for fussy eaters. Their delicious flavour and satisfying texture make them a great motivational tool to keep your dog engaged, happy, and well-behaved

Value for Money: Our convenient, re-sealable bag contains 35+ real meat dog chew sticks, with a weight of 500 grams. Each package with dimension of 15x10x10 cm is packed with only the best ingredients, including 60% min protein, 2% max fat, 2% min fiber, 4% max ash, and 20% max moisture, made with 47% chicken breast and 48.5% rawhide. DriedDogTreats top priority is to provide top-quality products and services to ensure our customer satisfaction

specifications_table.Storage Information: ‎‎Please store in a dry non-humid environment. No refrigeration required. Keep away from direct sunlight. Fresh water should be available at all times.
specifications_table.Special features: ‎Soft and Chewy Texture, Flexible and Not Too Dry
specifications_table.Specific Uses: ‎Behavioural Training, Daily Use, Indoor, Outdoor, Sports and Training
